reason:
Set 034 close-out: routed end-of-session verification was deferred
in favor of operator on-device visual verification of the live VS
Code extension host pre-publish.

Risk profile is rendered-text + DOM shape changes (per-row chevron +
state-badge dropped, fraction list-icon added, accordion retired,
bucket-level collapse, cursor-anchored context menu). Layer 1 (643
pytest passed) + Layer 2 (462 mocha passed; 2 pre-existing failures
unrelated to this release) cover the typed contracts. The visual
rendering was iterated through 5 preview rounds with operator
screenshot review, then validated in extension host with the
packaged VSIX before vsce publish — that is materially better
verification of the visual surface than a routed verifier can
provide (routed verifier reads source, not pixels).

Operator: darndestdabbler. Approved for publish prior to running
vsce publish; v0.19.0 went live on Marketplace before this
close-out.
